_comment: Provider presets for gorchera_start_job. Copy the desired block's fields into your gorchera_start_job call.
_note: 3-agent pipeline: director (planning/judgment) -> executor (implementation) -> evaluator (code review + gate). pipeline_mode controls evaluator depth, strictness_level controls judgment aggressiveness, ambition_level controls executor scope.
_pre_build_commands_note: Copy pre_build_commands into your gorchera_start_job call to run setup steps before engine build/test. Examples by language:

cross-provider (recommended)._description: GPT plans, Claude executes. Best quality/cost ratio.

codex-only (GPT budget)._description: All GPT default models. Director/evaluator use strong model, executor uses efficient model.

mini (budget)._description: All gpt-5.4-mini. Low cost, decent quality.

spark (ultra-fast)._description: All gpt-5.3-codex-spark. Near-instant coding, lowest latency. Pro subscription required.

claude-only._description: All Claude. Director/evaluator use Opus, executor uses Sonnet.

production (strict + extreme)._description: Maximum quality. Strict adversarial evaluator + extreme ambition. GPT plans, Claude executes.

production-spark (strict + extreme, budg._description: Production quality with Spark models. Strict evaluator, extreme ambition, all Spark.

production-spark-claude-eval (recommende._description: Spark executor for speed, Claude Sonnet evaluator for accurate judgment. Best strict-mode combo.

prompt_overrides.evaluator: Pay special attention to domain completeness and extensible design.
